metadata.name: Code-only custom evaluator sample
metadata.description: Demonstrates a code-only (non-LLM) custom evaluator. The forbidden_terms evaluator is resolved at runtime from <project_root>/custom-evaluators/forbidden_terms/, which contains only forbidden_terms.py (no .prompty), so it runs as a pure Python check and needs no Azure OpenAI configuration.

items.prompt: Draft a short reply confirming the meeting time.
Summarize the policy in two sentences.
